name: Staff Engineer Strategic Alignment Rubric
instructions: Evaluate whether the onboarding roadmap provides deeply contextual, prioritized engineering strategy based on the parsed codebase topology.

metrics.strategic_actionability: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if every phase lists specific files/modules and explicitly dictates what to modify. Score 1 if recommendations are generic engineering platitudes.
metrics.topography_adherence: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if the risks and quick wins focus strictly on classes or boundaries present in the parsed map. Deduct points if the model targets components that do not exist.
metrics.coverage_index: Rate 1-5. Did the roadmap comprehensively cover all 5 dimensions requested (quick wins, major risks, org adjustments, architecture investments, observability/testing)?
